a: Gold members may return items within 45 days of delivery.
b: A Gold tier customer has 45 days to return an item.
label: same
note: gold return window, paraphrase

a: Standard customers can return unworn items within 30 days.
b: The standard return window is 30 days for any customer.
label: same
note: standard return window, paraphrase

a: Approved refunds post to the original payment method in 5-7 business days.
b: Refunds are issued to the original card within five to seven business days.
label: same
note: refund settlement, paraphrase

a: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days.
b: Delivery normally arrives in three to five business days.
label: same
note: shipping time, paraphrase

a: An order belongs to a customer and lists the purchased items.
b: Each order is linked to a customer and records the items bought.
label: same
note: order entity, paraphrase

a: A customer is a person or organization that places orders.
b: Customers are people or organizations that submit orders.
label: same
note: customer entity, paraphrase

a: Membership tiers are Standard, Silver, and Gold.
b: There are three loyalty tiers: Standard, Silver, and Gold.
label: same
note: membership tier, paraphrase

a: Route an unhappy customer to a supervisor via the internal support channel.
b: Escalate a complaint by notifying a supervisor through the support channel.
label: same
note: escalation playbook, paraphrase

a: Gold members get an extended window to send products back.
b: Loyalty top-tier buyers are granted six-plus weeks to undo a purchase.
label: same
note: same gold-return concept, divergent wording

a: Customers may swap a delivered product for another size at no cost.
b: Exchanges let a shopper trade an item for a different variant.
label: same
note: same exchanges concept, low overlap

a: Refunds go back to the card used at checkout.
b: Money is returned to the original payment instrument after approval.
label: same
note: same refund concept, low overlap

a: Notify a manager when a case cannot be resolved on first contact.
b: Hand a stuck support ticket up to a supervisor.
label: same
note: same escalation concept, low overlap

a: Gold members get 45 days to return an item.
b: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days.
label: different
note: return vs shipping

a: Refunds post in 5-7 business days.
b: A customer holds exactly one membership tier.
label: different
note: refund vs membership

a: Escalate complaints to a supervisor.
b: An order records the items purchased and the delivery date.
label: different
note: escalation vs order

a: Exchanges allow swapping for a different size.
b: Contact channels include email, live chat, and phone.
label: different
note: exchanges vs channels

a: A customer places one or more orders.
b: Shipping updates are sent on the preferred channel.
label: different
note: customer vs channels

a: Membership tiers grant escalating perks.
b: An exchange ships at no extra cost.
label: different
note: membership vs exchanges

a: The standard return window is 30 days for all customers.
b: The Gold member return window is 45 days.
label: different
note: distinct concepts, high overlap (return window/days)

a: Customers may return items within the return window.
b: Customers may exchange items within the return window.
label: different
note: returns vs exchanges, high overlap

a: Refund processing returns money to the original payment method.
b: An approved return triggers a refund to the customer.
label: different
note: refunds policy vs returns policy, high overlap

a: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days.
b: Refunds settle within 5-7 business days.
label: different
note: shipping vs refunds, shared 'business days'

a: Gold members get free expedited shipping as a perk.
b: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days and offers expedited options.
label: different
note: membership perk vs shipping policy, shared 'expedited shipping'

a: Handle a return by checking the order and the membership tier.
b: The glossary defines restocking fee, return window, and tier.
label: different
note: playbook vs glossary, shared 'tier/return'
